creator: freebsd-bugs@aliases.systohc.net
text:
Created attachment 182507
Patch

Some SFTP clients can't login with 1.3.5d anymore, including the OpenSSH SFTP one:

http://bugs.proftpd.org/show_bug.cgi?id=4287

Patch to the newest version attached, you may still want to change TIMESTAMP in distinfo.

Thanks!
